commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a native .NET/WinForms Windows taskbar tray companion with GitHub/local status features, OAuth/Credential Manager storage, Windows scripts, packaging, CI, docs, tests, and screenshot proof.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a current-main bug report; this is a feature PR. The review findings are source-reproducible from the PR diff and the checked-in Windows files at the PR head.
